title: Better GUI
description: New GUIs for all Minecraft crafting tables and inventories!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Better_Vanilla_GUI/MP_BetterVanillaGUI_header.webp) Better Vanilla GUI will change all the GUIs of Minecraft’s workstations, including the creative inventory and many other workstations added by other mods. In this first version, support has been added for all workstations, villager interfaces, and mobs such as camels, horses, mules, etc., as well as chests, furnaces, shulkers, basically anything that has a GUI in vanilla Minecraft. The new look for the creative inventory is also already available. The goal of this resource pack is to add compatibility with other interfaces added by other mods. We will do this in future versions. - New interfaces have been added for some blocks in the following mods: MrCrayfish's Furniture, Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, Bartering Station, Wider Ender Chests and Rune Crafting. WE RECOMMEND USING **_[OptiGUI!](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)_** The designer of these GUIs is Ferrum. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Better_Vanilla_GUI/MP_BetterVanillaGUI_description.webp) Important: There is a RELEASE version and a BETA version. We only recommend using the BETA when playing with a modpack that doesn’t allow you to add _**[OptiGUI!](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)**_. In most cases, though, you’ll be able to add it correctly using Fabric, or by using **_[Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)_** on Forge or NeoForge. If you don’t use OptiGUI, some GUIs won’t work correctly, such as villagers, shulkers, or ender chests. The BETA version adds a standard design so that, even without OptiGUI, you won’t experience any visual issues. Unfortunately, Ender Chests will still appear identical to normal chests. Credits: We have taken inspiration from several resource packs, and we would like to give special mention to **[Colourful Containers GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui)**. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Better_Vanilla_GUI/MP_BetterVanillaGUI_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Better_Vanilla_GUI/MP_BetterVanillaGUI_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tp4jv4sv/images/71d3163795c107176511f2074d0e033e1eab4dba.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tp4jv4sv/images/103ff54ea3ae5d2470c3ffd54235a5853fe52b94.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
